scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: OPTIONS sip:[field1]@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 OPTIONS Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: 0
